intent: Sweep fixture (MIN) for 1s_2br_wd_quadrant_split_baths_ds_ld -- 12x9 m lot, 40 m2 buildable floor (8x5 envelope). The shallowest lot that solves natively on this topology; at buildable depth 5 the preferred bath/kitchen sizes don't fit, so it drops to the base auto_apply floors (carries a soft tiered_preferred_dropped warning -- still COMPLIANT). 11x9 (7x5) is infeasible.
